backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing chat functionality with user profiles, one-to-one and group messaging, message editing/deletion, admin controls, and blob storage integration using Motoko.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (authentication, profiles, messaging, contacts, groups, search, admin) to their corresponding files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend TypeScript/React components and configuration files.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind directives defining OKLCH color system variables for light and dark themes with custom design tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the ChatFlow React application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication flow, profile setup modal display, and rendering the main Layout with theme provider and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard component displaying user and message statistics with access control validation and navigation back to main app.
frontend/src/components/ChatHeader.tsx: Displays the chat header with avatar, name, and action buttons for search and group settings. Includes inline message search functionality with result count display.
frontend/src/components/ChatWindow.tsx: Main chat window component that renders the chat header, scrollable message history, and message input. Shows a welcome screen when no chat is selected.
frontend/src/components/ConversationItem: Renders a single conversation list item with avatar, display name, last message preview, timestamp, and delete button with confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/ConversationList: Displays a sidebar list of all conversations with search filtering, loading states, and dropdown menu to create new chats or groups.
frontend/src/components/CreateGroupModal: Modal dialog for creating group chats with group name input, avatar upload with progress tracking, and member search/selection functionality.
frontend/src/components/DeleteMessageDia: Alert dialog for deleting messages with an option to delete for everyone or just the current user.
frontend/src/components/EditMessageModal: Modal dialog with textarea for editing existing message content with validation and loading states.
frontend/src/components/EmojiPicker.tsx: A popover component that displays categorized emoji selections (Smileys, Gestures, Hearts, Objects) and triggers a callback when an emoji is clicked.
frontend/src/components/FileUploadButton: A file upload button component that validates file size (max 10MB), uploads files using ExternalBlob with progress tracking, and sends a text message with file metadata.
frontend/src/components/GroupSettingsMod: A modal dialog for managing group chat settings including name, avatar upload, adding/removing members, and assigning admin roles with user search functionality.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Application header with branding, theme toggle, and user dropdown menu showing profile, admin panel access (if admin), and login/logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component that orchestrates the app structure with header, conversation list, chat window, and conditional admin panel display.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Internet Identity authentication button that handles login/logout with loading states and query cache clearing on logout.
frontend/src/components/MessageActions.t: Dropdown menu for message actions (edit/delete) that only appears within 5 minutes of message creation and triggers corresponding modals.
frontend/src/components/MessageBubble.ts: Displays individual chat messages with sender avatar, timestamp, edited indicator, and conditional message actions on hover for own messages.
frontend/src/components/MessageInput.tsx: Chat input component with textarea, emoji picker, file upload button, and send functionality supporting Enter to send and Shift+Enter for new lines.
frontend/src/components/NewChatModal.tsx: Modal component for creating new chats by searching for users by username and initiating a conversation with them.
frontend/src/components/ProfileEditModal: Modal component for editing the current user's profile including username, status message, and avatar with upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Initial profile setup modal for new users to create their username, status, and avatar; cannot be dismissed until completed.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: Button component that toggles between light and dark themes using next-themes with sun/moon icons.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication, initializing access control and invalidating queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for user profiles, conversations, chat history, and message operations (send, edit, delete) with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes using OKLCH color space, defining colors for UI elements (primary, secondary, destructive, sidebar, charts) and custom utility classes for message bubbles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that sets up the root component with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, container settings, border radius variables, custom shadows, accordion animations, and font family stack with Inter as primary font.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing ChatFlow as a WhatsApp-like messaging application with polling-based updates, Internet Identity authentication, and features including private/group messaging, media sharing, message editing/deletion, and admin panel.
